"After Twenty Years" is a fascinating story about friendship, promises, and choices. Set in a city at night, it follows two friends who agree to meet after twenty years apart. The reading level is B1, making it suitable for learners who want to improve their English. This engaging tale is about 5,000 words long, perfect for a quick read. What will happen when they finally meet? Will their friendship be the same? Dive into this intriguing story and discover the surprises that lie ahead!
